src/main/App.java.general_idea: Replace inline Javalin configuration and route registration with a centralized AppConfig factory method.
Remove imports for Javalin, Dotenv, and controllers that are no longer used in the main class.
src/main/App.java.human_impl: Removed imports for io.javalin.Javalin, io.github.cdimascio.dotenv.Dotenv, etc.

src/main/App.java.general_idea: Remove the hardcoded ASYNC_TIME_OUT constant as configuration is now handled by AppConfig.
Remove the large block comment describing the server API endpoints from the main class.
src/main/App.java.human_impl: Removed the multi-line comment block starting with 'Server API:'

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated legacy MongoClient with the modern synchronous driver API (MongoClients) to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and current driver versions.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: import com.mongodb.client.MongoClient; import com.mongodb.client.MongoClients; ... client = MongoClients.create(clientSettings);

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Update connection string handling from MongoClientURI to ConnectionString to align with the new driver API.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: import com.mongodb.ConnectionString; ... ConnectionString connectionString = new ConnectionString(MONGO_URI);

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Refactor codec registration to use the new CodecRegistry builder pattern required by the modern driver.
Integrate automatic POJO codec provider to allow direct mapping of Java objects to BSON without manual document conversion.
Register specific custom codecs for Metadata and Section classes to handle complex nested structures during serialization.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: import Form.FormMetadata.MetadataCodec; ... CodecRegistries.fromCodecs(new IntegerCodec(), new MetadataCodec())

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Replace dotenv library usage with direct System.getenv calls for environment variable retrieval.
Define explicit constants for database names corresponding to different deployment environments.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: public static final String MONGO_DB_TEST = "test-db"; public static final String MONGO_DB_STAGING = "staging-db";

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Implement a method to retrieve the correct MongoDatabase instance based on a DeploymentLevel enum.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: public static MongoDatabase getDatabase(DeploymentLevel deploymentLevel) { switch (deploymentLevel) { ... } }

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Add explicit methods to close the client connection and drop databases for proper resource management.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.human_impl: public static void closeClientConnection() { client.close(); } public static void dropDatabase(...) { db.drop(); }

src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.general_idea: The enum now implements the Message interface to standardize response handling.
Added import for the Message interface.
Added import for JSON serialization support.
Converted simple enum constants to constructor-based constants with associated error message strings.
Added a field to store the error message string for each enum constant.
Added a constructor to initialize the error message field.
Added method to convert the status to a JSON response string.
Added method to extract the error name from the message string.
Added method to extract the error description from the message string.
Added method to serialize the status to a JSONObject with default message.
Added overloaded method to serialize the status to a JSONObject with a custom message.
Consolidated multiple invalid character enum constants into a single INVALID_CHARACTERS constant.
Added new enum constant for invalid parameters.
Added new enum constant for creation failures.
src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.human_impl: FAIL_TO_CREATE("Could not create user and/or org")

src/main/Organization/OrgEnrollmentStatu.general_idea: Added new enum constant for success status.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Extract business logic from controller handlers into dedicated service classes to improve separation of concerns.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Replaced inline MongoDB queries and logic in `enrollOrganization`, `listOrgs`, and `findMembersOfOrgs` with calls to `EnrollOrganizationService`, `ListOrgsService`, and `FindMemberService`.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Introduce constructor-based dependency injection for database and utility dependencies to replace static access patterns.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Added constructor `OrganizationController(MongoDatabase db, ActivityDao activityDao)` and fields for `db`, `activityDao`, and `encryptionUtils`.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Remove direct dependency on Auth0 JWT library in favor of a centralized encryption utility.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Removed imports for `com.auth0.jwt.*` and replaced manual JWT/Argon2 hashing logic with `EncryptionUtils.getInstance()`.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Adopt Lombok for boilerplate-free logging initialization.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Added `@Slf4j` annotation and replaced manual logger calls with `log.info()`.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Standardize API response structure using a unified Message object.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Changed response generation to use `Message.getErrorName()` and `Message.getErrorDescription()` instead of specific status enums like `OrgEnrollmentStatus`.

src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.general_idea: Externalize configuration values for organization URLs into environment variables.
src/main/Organization/OrganizationContro.human_impl: Added static final fields `newOrgTestURL` and `newOrgActualURL` reading from `System.getenv()`.

src/main/User/UserMessage.java.general_idea: Make UserMessage implement the Message interface to standardize message handling.
Add import for org.json.JSONObject to support JSON serialization.
Add new error/success message constants to the enum.
src/main/User/UserMessage.java.human_impl: INVALID_PARAMETER(...), SERVER_ERROR(...), INSUFFICIENT_PRIVILEGE(...), INVALID_PRIVILEGE_TYPE(...), SUCCESS(...), TOKEN_ISSUED(...), EMPTY_FIELD(...), EMAIL_DOES_NOT_EXIST(...), CROSS_ORG_ACTION_DENIED(...)

src/main/User/UserMessage.java.general_idea: Remove obsolete error message constant DIFFERENT_ORGANIZATION.
Correct typo in NONADMIN_ENROLL_ADMIN error code from NONDMIN_ENROLL_AADMIN.
Change errorMessage field visibility from public to private.
Rename toString to toResponseString to avoid ambiguity and return JSON string.
Add withMessage method to allow dynamic message customization.
Add toJSON method to serialize the message into a JSONObject.
Add overloaded toJSON method to serialize with a custom message.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler source and target levels from Java 11 to Java 21.
Add JAXB API dependency which was removed from the JDK module system starting in Java 11.
Add JNA dependency for native platform access.
Add Lob Java SDK for mailing services.
Add Apache Commons IO for file handling utilities.
Add Google Tink GCP KMS integration for encryption.
Add Google Tink core library for cryptographic operations.
Add Google HTTP Client Jackson2 integration.
Add JSON Simple library for JSON parsing.
Add Apache Commons Text for string manipulation.
Add IPInfo API client for IP geolocation.
Add JJWT library for JWT token handling.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 for general utility methods.
Remove Javalin web framework dependency.
Remove explicit SLF4J API dependency.
Remove SLF4J Simple binding dependency.
Remove Java Dotenv dependency for environment variable loading.
Remove Heroku Maven plugin configuration.
Add Maven Surefire plugin for test execution.
Add JaCoCo plugin for code coverage reporting.
Update Maven Compiler Plugin to a newer version compatible with Java 21.
Explicitly set project build source encoding to UTF-8.
Define explicit source and resource directories in the build configuration.
Configure Maven Assembly Plugin to execute during the package phase.
Remove Maven Dependency Plugin configuration for copying dependencies.
Explicitly set the project packaging type to jar.

Procfile.general_idea: Remove the explicit -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 JVM argument because UTF-8 is the default file encoding in Java 21.
Procfile.human_impl: Removed '-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8' from the java command in Procfile.
